name: Buttermilk Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, cornmeal, and salt.
2. Add buttermilk and eggs to the dry ingredients; stir until blended.
3. Stir in vanilla and melted margarine into the batter.
4. Pour the mixture into an unbaked 9-inch pastry shell.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until set.
6. Check for doneness after the minimum baking time by gently shaking the pie; the center should be set with a slight jiggle.
7. Cool on a wire rack for approximately 1 hour.
Yield: 1 9-inch pie
